CustomField.description: Controls whether Opportunity rollups (donor statistics) are calculated immediately during data import processing or deferred to the nightly scheduled job. Enabling this ensures rollup data is current immediately after import but increases processing time and governor limit consumption.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check to calculate donor rollup statistics immediately during import processing. Leave unchecked to defer rollups to the nightly scheduled job. Enabling this may slow batch processing.
CustomField.label: Calculate Donation Rollups with Batch
